actions.value:
Hello, and apologies for the trouble with your SOL wallet.


There is an active issue going on with Solana that is independent of Edge and causing 75%+ of submitted transactions to fail. We are keeping a close eye on it, along with the rest of the Solana community. Please allow some time for Solana developers to deploy a fix for this. Hopefully it's self-resolving soon.


For more insight: https://u.today/solana-founder-breaks-silence-on-core-network-challenges

Edge's statement: https://support.edge.app/hc/en-us/articles/24674274432283-Solana-Network-Congestion


Let us know if you have any other questions about this.
